flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Piedmont Community College fell 44% between 2006 and 2009 (49.1% → 27.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Piedmont Community College fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (726 → 457).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Piedmont Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (70.5% → 60.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Piedmont Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (10.0% → 0.0%).
